description: Interactive contest mechanics using follow, like, and mention actions to drive audience participation and boost engagement through gamified entry requirements.
structural_recipe: Post high-interest content (sports events, exclusive experiences) paired with numbered step-by-step entry instructions. Structure: (1) Opening hook with emoji flags/stadium visuals, (2) Prize reveal (tickets, exclusive access), (3) Clear numbered entry steps (follow + like + mention), (4) Call-to-action reinforcement. Use Arabic captions with Arabic numerals for list items (🔹 step format). Include relevant hashtags and event context.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences respond strongly to competitive mechanics tied to cultural moments (sports derbies like Al-Nasr vs Al-Hilal). The multi-step requirement (follow/like/mention) maximizes algorithmic signals while creating a sense of legitimate chance/fairness. Numbering and clarity respect audience preference for explicit instructions. Sports context adds prestige and FOMO.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure prizes align with local regulations (gambling/contest laws in KSA)
Sports events must be verified/official to maintain credibility
Mention mechanics require careful moderation to avoid spam/bot activity
Regional sports loyalties are intense—be cautious with divisive team content outside brand partnerships
cultural_constraints: Prize distribution must follow Islamic finance principles if applicable
Contest timing should avoid prayer times for maximum reach
